features.name: non-blocking assignment in always_latch
features.description: Code should include an always_latch procedural block with a non-blocking assignment (<=) inside a conditional if statement

features.name: parameterized width latch module
features.description: Code should include a latch module with a width parameter and non-blocking assignment to a registered signal
features.snippet: module latch #(parameter width_p = 0) (input clk_i, input [width_p-1:0] data_i, output logic [width_p-1:0] data_o); logic [width_p-1:0] data_r; always_latch if (clk_i) data_r <= data_i; assign data_o = data_r; endmodule
